title: Iran Responds to Trump’s Energy Threat With Defiance and Warnings of Its Own
summary_full: Tehran “will not hesitate in defending its people and its land,” a senior official said, after President Trump threatened to destroy Iranian power plants.
summary_public: Tehran “will not hesitate in defending its people and its land,” a senior official said, after President Trump threatened to destroy Iranian power plants.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran Responds to Trump’s Energy Threat With Defiance and Warnings of Its Own
